case_title: INNOCENT OKORONKWO VS. EDUARDO PANIAGUA ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$18.00) SERVED JAN-08-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ASTURIAS, ELENA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-06-2015 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO MAY-12-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-12-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-12-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF A MINOR---JOHN OKORONKWO WAS NOT PRESENT BUT WAS REPRESENTED BY INNOCENT OKORONKWO (GUARDIAN AD LITEM). DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT ELENA ASTURIAS WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY OKORONKWO, INNOCENT (GUARDIAN AD LITEM) SUING ON BEHALF OF MINOR - JOHN OKORONKWO AS TO DEFENDANT PANIAGUA, EDUARDO ASTURIAS, ELENA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-06-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE GRANTED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OKORONKWO, INNOCENT (GUARDIAN AD LITEM) SUING ON BEHALF OF MINOR - JOHN OKORONKWO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PANIAGUA, EDUARDO ASTURIAS, ELENA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PETITION AND ORDER FOR APPOINTMENT OF GUARDIAN AD LITEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF OKORONKWO, INNOCENT (GUARDIAN AD LITEM) SUING ON BEHALF OF MINOR - JOHN OKORONKWO
ORDER ON APPLICATION FOR APPOINTMENT OF GUARDIAN AD LITEM. THE COURT ORDERS THAT INNOCENT OKORONKWO IS HEREBY APPOINTED AS THE GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR:JOHN OKORONKWO.
